judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical eye-exposure steps and order: rinse eye open with water for 15-20 minutes, remove contact lenses after 5 minutes and continue rinsing, and call poison control/doctor once rinsing begins. The added do-not-stop warning is grounded and field-usable.
